preamble: The shift from 'kʲ' to 'c' is a classic stage of fronting in palatalization. Velar stops move forward to a palatal position under the influence of following front vowels, often serving as an intermediate step before affrication.

examples.note: Stages in the Slavic First Palatalization where velars moved to palatal stops before further affrication.
Intermediate stage in the development of Latin velars before front vowels.

sources: Ladefoged, P., & Maddieson, I. (1996). The Sounds of the World's Languages.
Schenker, A. M. (1995). The Dawn of Slavic.
